zh.Dyffryn, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: 威爾士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Rhys於1089年出生在威爾士丹比爾時，她的父親Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog13歲，母親Lleucu ferch Llewelyn12歲。她於1110年與Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1149年在英國威爾斯丹比爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.Dyffryn, Glamorgan, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh-hans.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: 威尔士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Rhys于1089年出生在威尔士丹比爾时，她的父亲Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog13岁，母亲Lleucu ferch Llewelyn12岁。她于1110年与Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1149年在英国威尔斯丹比爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Rhys was born in 1089, in Denbighshire, Wales, her father, Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog, was 13 and her mother, Lleucu ferch Llewelyn, was 12. She married Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland in 1110, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1149, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Rhys est née en 1089, à Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Lleucu ferch Llewelyn, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland en 1110, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1149, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Rhys 1089 in Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog 13 und ihre Mutter Lleucu ferch Llewelyn 12. Sie hat 1110 in Wales, United Kingdom Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1149 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Rhys è nata il nel 1089 nel Denbighshire, Galles, sua padre, Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Lleucu ferch Llewelyn, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland nel 1110, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1149, nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Rhysが1089年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchogは13歳，母Lleucu ferch Llewelynは12歳であった。1110年にイギリスウェールズでIthel ap Einudd of Ruthinlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1149年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.Dyffryn, Glamorgan, Wales: 영국 웨일스 글램르건 디프린 비 머스이르 타이드피

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Rhys(이)가 1089년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lleucu ferch Llewelyn(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1110년 영국 웨일스에서 Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1149년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: диффрин би миртир тидфил, глэморган, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Rhys родилась в 1089 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhys "Goch" ap Llewelyn Eurdorchog было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Lleucu ferch Llewelyn, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland в 1110 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1149 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland en 1110, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1149, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
